faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Belleville homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic matter that accumulates inside drains, pipes, and other moist areas. In Belleville's older homes and buildings, aging plumbing systems and slow drains create ideal breeding conditions. Poor ventilation in bathrooms and basements also contributes to the problem.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Belleville?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Belleville properties take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and number of affected drains. Our technicians thoroughly inspect all potential breeding sites, treat drains with professional-grade solutions, and provide recommendations to prevent recurrence.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 drain fly treatment service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a complete inspection of all drains and moisture-prone areas, professional enzymatic and biological drain treatments, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, application of residual treatments, and a follow-up plan. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after drain fly treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in adult drain flies within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 7-14 days as the treatment breaks the breeding cycle. We provide guidance on maintenance practices to ensure drain flies don't return to your Belleville property.
